page_content:
Prerequisite: ENSE621, ENSE622, and ENSE623.

Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.

ENSE799 Systems Engineering Thesis (1-6 Credits)

The application of systems engineering concepts, principles, and theories will be applied to the Master's Thesis project. Project/thesis work will

be defined and selected early in student's program and supervised by a university faculty mentor.

Prerequisite: Permission of ENGR-Institute for Systems Research; and ENSE621; and must have 6 additional credits totaling 9 credit hours. Repeatable to: 6 credits.
